title: Lovell's Manual Burn Calculation
description: Three pages of graph paper covered in Lovell's handwriting — the PC+2 burn calculation performed by hand using a slide rule and a celestial mechanics reference card, without the guidance computer. The numbers are dense and precise. On the second page, a single figure has been erased and rewritten — the correction is visible as a slight smudge. The rewritten figure is circled. Whether the circled number is the correct one or the error is the question that will determine whether the ship enters the re-entry corridor or misses it entirely.
